hooks.command: echo "[primer] Today (Europe/Dublin): $(TZ=Europe/Dublin date '+%A %d %B %Y, %H:%M')"; [ -d node_modules ] && echo '[primer] node_modules: present' || echo '[primer] node_modules: MISSING - run npm ci before builds'; echo '[primer] Sandbox has NO Supabase env: admin pages cannot render locally. Build must pass FULLY (no CMS since Jul 2026 - articles are repo content in src/content/articles).'; echo '[primer] Ship flow: /check then /ship. Schema changes: /db-migrate. UI changes: /preview first.'
